sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: strong 23% revenue growth; high EPS growth 131% (operating leverage from scale)

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: cost position not clearly distinguishable from data

sources.name: Efficient Scale
sources.rationale: insufficient data for efficient scale assessment

analysis: Network Effect provide some competitive protection, but not all moat sources are fully developed. The company has defensible advantages that should persist for several years but may face erosion over time.
